{{Quote|My name's Sabmin Devist, by the way. Welcome to Imperial Sleeper Cell Jenth-44.|[[Sabmin Devist]]|<ref name="VotF" />}}
'''Jenth-44''' was one of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[sleeper cell]]s. Jenth-44 was located on [[Pakrik Minor]] by Thrawn, only to later swear allegiance to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] on the grounds that they just wanted to be left alone. The team included at least fourteen members.
